case_title: SPYNSIR TUCKER VS. THUONG NHAT HOANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUCKER, SPYNSIR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY TUCKER, SPYNSIR AS TO DEFENDANT HOANG, THUONG NHAT DBA GENERATION NAILS NGUYEN, ANH XUAN DBA GENERATION NAILS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $0.00 SERVED MAR-05-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOANG, THUONG NHAT DBA GENERATION NAILS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUCKER, SPYNSIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOANG, THUONG NHAT DBA GENERATION NAILS NGUYEN, ANH XUAN DBA GENERATION NAILS $150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT ANH XUAN NGUYEN DBA GENERATION NAILS, ONLY TO MAY-20-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH DEFENDANTS DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED APR-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, ANH XUAN DBA GENERATION NAILS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
